ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the grant project */,
  "contact_pi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Principal Investigator */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "msi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Minority Serving Institution */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the grant */,
  "congressional_district_id" INTEGER /* Congressional district of the institution */,
  "nrsa_stipends" INTEGER /* Number of NRSA stipends awarded */,
  "total_dollars_awarded" REAL /* Total dollars awarded for the grant */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., R01, R21, etc.) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for application submission */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of review */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_congressional_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("congressional_district_id") REFERENCES congressional_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_contact_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_pi_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_msi_id FOREIGN KEY ("msi_id") REFERENCES msi ("msi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Principal Investigator */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Full name of the Principal Investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the Principal Investigator */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the Principal Investigator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the Principal Investigator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the Principal Investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_principal_investigators_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "chair_name" TEXT /* Name of the department chair */,
  "chair_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department chair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "msi" (
  "msi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSI */,
  "msi_name" TEXT /* Name of the MSI */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MSI */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the MSI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "congressional_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the congressional district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the district is located */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the district representative */,
  "representative_email" TEXT /* Email address of the district representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant application */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., new, renewal, etc.) */,
  "budget_justification" TEXT /* Justification for the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant award */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was granted */,
  "amount_awarded" REAL /* Amount awarded */,
  "award_notice_date" TEXT /* Date the award notice was sent */,
  "project_period" TEXT /* Project period of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_awards_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant application */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_type" TEXT /* Type of revision (e.g., administrative, scientific, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_revisions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES grant_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, final, etc.) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Reporting period of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Agency providing the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_funding_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborating institution */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborating institution */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., subcontract, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_collaborations_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_collaborations_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "author_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of author IDs */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID (PMID) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_publications_author_ids FOREIGN KEY ("author_ids") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_publications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the patent was filed */,
  "patent_number" TEXT /* Patent number */,
  "patent_status" TEXT /* Status of the patent (e.g., pending, granted, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_patents_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., software, database, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_products_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)
